translate-all.settings.apiKey.name: OpenAI API Key
translate-all.settings.apiKey.hint: Your secret API key to access ChatGPT.
translate-all.settings.apiEndpoint.name: API Endpoint
translate-all.settings.apiEndpoint.hint: The endpoint to use for the API. Change this if you are using a proxy or a different compatible API.
translate-all.settings.language.name: Language
translate-all.settings.language.hint: The language to translate descriptions into.
translate-all.settings.game.system.name: Select Game System
translate-all.settings.game.system.hint: Choose the game system for which you want to translate descriptions.
translate-all.settings.model.name: Target Model
translate-all.settings.model.hint: The model to use for translation. Default is 'GPT-4o Mini'.
translate-all.settings.promptTemplatePat: Path to a text file containing a custom prompt (e.g., /modules/translate-all/prompts/dnd5e.txt)
translate-all.settings.tts.enabled.name: Enable Read-Aloud TTS (experimental, PF2E only)
translate-all.settings.tts.enabled.hint:
Adds a small Text-to-Speech button next to each

paragraph in Pathfinder 2e sheets and journals.
translate-all.settings.tts.apiEndpoint.h: OpenAI-compatible TTS endpoint base URL. The module appends '/audio/speech'. Leave empty to reuse the translation API endpoint.
translate-all.settings.tts.apiKey.name: TTS API Key
translate-all.settings.tts.apiKey.hint: API key used to authenticate against the TTS endpoint. Leave empty to reuse the translation API key.
translate-all.settings.tts.model.name: TTS Model
translate-all.settings.tts.voice.name: TTS Voice
translate-all.settings.tts.voice.hint: Voice preset used by the TTS model.
Free-form style/tone instructions sent to the TTS model (e.g., 'narrate dramatically, slow pacing, ominous tone'). Only used by steerable models such as gpt-4o-mini-tts; ignored by tts-1/tts-1-hd. Leave empty to disable.
